sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Delta Air Lines Ditched Starlink For This: Inside Amazon Leo's Secret Weapon For Ultra-Fast Inflight WiFi
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines has chosen Amazon’s Project Kuiper (LEO satellite network) over Starlink for its next-generation inflight WiFi, signaling a major strategic shift in commercial aviation connectivity. This decision prioritizes deep integration with the airline's operational and commercial ecosystem, including cloud services, beyond just faster internet speeds. Amazon's solution offers a low-profile antenna and efficient installation process, aiming to transform onboard connectivity from a passenger amenity into core operational infrastructure for Delta's diverse fleet.

feed.title: Delta Air Lines Expands Atlanta to Caribbean Routes for 2026 Winter, Boosting Antigua, St. Kitts, Curaçao Travel Demand
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines is significantly expanding its seasonal winter routes from Atlanta to Caribbean destinations like Antigua, St. Kitts, Curaçao, Bonaire, and St. Croix for 2026, driven by exploding leisure travel demand. Atlanta, Delta's largest hub, serves as a central gateway, leveraging its extensive domestic feeder traffic and operational efficiency. This strategic expansion focuses on weekend and seasonal flights to maximize profitability and caters to the growing trend of leisure travel dominating the aviation industry.
